query:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(
            EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
                LEAST(e.end_at, $4) - GREATEST(e.start_at, $3)
            )) / 60
        ), 0)::bigint AS "busy_minutes!"
        FROM events e
        JOIN calendars c ON c.id = e.calendar_id
        WHERE e.org_id = $1 AND c.user_id = $2
          AND e.status != 'cancelled'
          AND e.end_at > $3 AND e.start_at < $4
